title: မဟာသမယသုတ်

content.burmese: မဟာသမယသုတ် (အကျဉ်းချုပ်)
နတ်ဗြဟ္မာ ဆယ်ဘုံစလုံးမှ လာရောက်ဖူးမြော်ကြပါသည်
content.romanization: Devas and Brahmas from all realms came to pay respects
content.translation: Devas and Brahmas from the ten thousand worlds came to pay respects to the Buddha

content.burmese: ဧဝံ မေ သုတံ — ဧကံ သမယံ ဘဂဝါ သက္ကေသု ဝိဟရတိ ကပိလဝတ္ထုသ္မိံ မဟာဝနေ မဟတာ ဘိက္ခုသံဃေန သဒ္ဓိံ ပဉ္စမတ္တေဟိ ဘိက္ခုသတေဟိ...
content.romanization: Evaṃ me sutaṃ — ekaṃ samayaṃ bhagavā sakkesu viharati kapilavatthusmiṃ mahāvane mahatā bhikkhusaṅghena saddhiṃ pañcamattehi bhikkhusatehi
content.translation: Thus have I heard — At one time the Blessed One was staying among the Sakyans at Kapilavatthu in the Great Wood together with a large Saṅgha of about five hundred bhikkhus
